summary: Iteration 58: Rice Sale Tab New Features - RST No field, Cash Paid / Diesel Paid auto-creating truck payment entries, Mark Paid / Undo Paid / Payment History. All 16 backend tests PASSED. All UI flows verified working correctly.

issues: Missing aria-describedby warning in console for DialogContent (minor accessibility)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend private_trading.py: create_rice_sale (line 257-281) - Creates entry with rst_no, cash_paid, diesel_paid fields
Backend private_trading.py: _create_cashbook_for_rice_sale (line 284-339) - Creates cash_transactions and diesel_accounts entries for truck payments
Backend private_trading.py: mark_rice_sale_paid (line 600-637) - Requires admin role, creates jama entries when balance > 0
Backend private_trading.py: undo_rice_sale_paid (line 640-658) - Resets paid_amount=0, balance=total, deletes linked payments
Backend private_trading.py: get_rice_sale_history (line 662-670) - Returns payment history array with total_paid
Backend private_trading.py: delete_rice_sale (line 377-389) - Cascades delete to cash_transactions, diesel_accounts, and private_payments
Frontend PrivateTrading.jsx: RiceSale component has all new fields in form (rst_no, cash_paid, diesel_paid)
Frontend shows RST No, Cash, Diesel columns in table header and values in rows
seed_data_creation: Created UITestBuyer entry for UI testing (deleted at end of test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rice Sale features are fully functional. RST No, Cash Paid, Diesel Paid fields working with truck payment auto-creation. Mark Paid/Undo/History features same as Paddy Purchase. Sillu entry (1000Q @ Rs.300, total Rs.300,000) exists in Rice Sale tab.

rice_sale_rst_no.ui_location: Rice Sale form - RST No. field

rice_sale_cash_paid.auto_creates: cash_transactions entry with category=truck_no, party_type=Truck, reference='rice_sale_cash:{id}'

mark_paid_endpoint.effects: Sets payment_status='paid', balance=0, creates jama entries

undo_paid_endpoint.effects: Sets payment_status='pending', paid_amount=0, balance=total_amount, deletes linked payments

cascade_delete.deletes: rice_sale entry, cash_transactions, diesel_accounts, private_payments linked entries

edit_with_populated_fields.verified: RST No, Cash Paid, Diesel Paid fields are populated when editing entry

ui_button_visibility.when_pending: Shows: Payment (₹), Mark Paid (✓), History, Edit, Delete
ui_button_visibility.when_paid: Shows: Undo (↶), History, Edit, Delete (no ₹ or ✓)

toast_notifications_verified.rice_sale_entry_save: Rice sale entry save ho gayi!

confirmation_dialogs_verified.mark_paid: UITestBuyer ko fully paid mark karna chahte hain? Balance Rs.19,000 clear hoga.
confirmation_dialogs_verified.undo_paid: UITestBuyer ka payment undo karna chahte hain? Sab reset ho jayega.
